channel.title: Projects on sanyam-mahajan.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on sanyam-mahajan.github.io

item.title: PrivacyLens India
item.description: A WCAG-compliant browser extension that analyses privacy policies against India’s DPDP Act.

item.title: Internet on Trust
item.description: Digital newsletter reaching 1,000+ readers on Substack, advocating for internet rights and digital governance reform.

item.title: Ramjas Political Review
item.description: Oversaw editorial, outreach, and design operations for Volume 1, Number 2.
